query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-p" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the core mechanism of "multi-teacher knowledge distillation" to compress ensemble knowledge into a single model, which is the fundamental technique underlying the user's "CollectionLoRA" approach. Although it does not use LoRA specifically, it provides the canonical prior work on the multi-teacher aggregation and compression mechanism that the user's research extends.
